svg.title: Redwood AI Insurance — fraud score decision tiers and inference paths
svg.desc: Decision tier routing from fraud score: four risk bands map to STP, evidence request, SIU referral, or payment hold. Sync vs async inference path split with latency budgets.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is the final fraud score produced?')
sendPrompt('What evidence is requested in the medium risk tier?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the sync inference path latency budget')
sendPrompt('What runs in the async enrichment path?')
sendPrompt('How does Redis serve features in under 10ms?')
sendPrompt('How does device reputation lookup work?')
sendPrompt('How is the graph neighborhood queried in 20ms?')
sendPrompt('How fast does XGBoost score a claim?')
sendPrompt('How does the deep ViT image analysis work?')
sendPrompt('How does full graph ring detection work?')
sendPrompt('How does LLM narrative reconciliation work?')
sendPrompt('What third-party enrichment data is used?')

svg.text: async result updates claim score → re-triggers escalation if materially exceeds sync score
